message:
fix(core): clippy auto-fixes + fix 7 stale-timestamp test failures in replay_capture

- Apply 190 clippy auto-fixes: add Eq derives, mul_add, sort_by_key, drain→into_iter, etc.
- Fix 7 pre-existing replay_capture test failures caused by hardcoded Nov 2023 timestamps
  (1700000000000) exceeding 90-day T1 retention policy — updated to epoch_ms_now()
- Add #[cfg(test)] annotations for test-only imports (ars_federation, replay_shadow_rollout)
- Add #[allow(dead_code)] for evaluate_result in latency_stages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
